About Us

Engineering Runs Deep

Since the late 1990s we’ve been shipping production software — from COM/ActiveX components to modern cross-platform mobile apps.

Our Story

Fody Labs started as a one-person consultancy and grew into a focused engineering studio. Over 25+ years we’ve worked with startups, enterprises, and everything in between — always hands-on, always code-first.

Today we specialize in .NET MAUI mobile development, building apps that feel native on every platform while sharing a single codebase. We combine deep platform knowledge with modern AI tooling to ship faster without cutting corners.

How We Work

Code-First

We write code, review code, and ship code. No committees, no slide decks.

Lean & Direct

Small team, fast decisions. You talk directly to the engineer building your product.

Ship Early

Working software over documentation. We iterate in short cycles with real builds.

AI-Augmented

We use AI tools daily to accelerate development — not replace engineering judgment.

Timeline

1999

Started building desktop applications with Delphi and C++

2005

Transitioned to .NET ecosystem — WinForms, WPF, ASP.NET

2015

First mobile projects with Xamarin

2022

Adopted .NET MAUI for cross-platform mobile development

2024

Integrated AI tooling into daily engineering workflow

Fody Labs

25+ years of engineering excellence
